title: nephrodium braineoides
intro: Nephrodium braineoides, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Nephrodium braineoides include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to be used in the treatment of various health conditions.
